title: maxentcpp: A C++ reimplementation of Maximum Entropy species distribution modeling for R

creators.name: Robles Fernández, Ángel Luis
creators.affiliation: Department of Ecology and Evolutionary Biology, University of Kansas

description: An R package providing a native C++17 implementation of the core continuous-predictor Maximum Entropy (Maxent) species distribution modeling workflow, targeting numerical fidelity with Java Maxent 3.4.4.
